title: Anika Floating Shelves/Cube Shaped Design/Set of 3 / Large, Medium, Small (Oak)
features: SET OF 3 FLOATING SHELVES - This set of three modern, oak-effect cube shelves offers a unique way to display cherished items, adding a touch of personality and style to any room.

3 SIZES - Made from MDF with a PVC oak-effect finish, the pack includes three sleek cubes in varying sizes—large (25cm x 25cm), medium (20cm x 20cm), and small (15cm x 15cm)—all with a depth of 9cm, providing versatile display options.
VERSATILE DESIGN - Complete with wall fixings, these shelves are perfect for enhancing the decor of bedrooms, living rooms, bathrooms, kitchens, offices, and more.
STRIKING STORAGE - With a sturdy load capacity of up to 3kg per shelf, these cube shelves are ideal for showcasing books, photos, keepsakes, toys, keys, or even hats in a visually striking way.
ANIKA - Anika is the leading manufacturer of homeware, bathroom and kitchen essentials. View the Anika store on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Previous page Decorative and Practical Ideal for showcasing plants, books, photos, or other decorative items. Fixings Included Includes sturdy brackets and fixings for quick and hassle-free installation. Space Saving Helps you save valuable floor space while providing additional storage.
